search_document:
User Request: Employee performance dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Employee Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of employee performance metrics over time
Title: Top Performing Employees
Type: table
Description: List of employees with the highest sales or performance metrics
Title: Total Sales by Employee
Type: kpi
Description: Aggregate sales figures attributed to each employee
Title: Employee Performance by Region
Type: chart
Description: Comparison of employee performance across different regions
Title: Sales Growth Rate
Type: kpi
Description: Percentage growth in sales attributed to employee efforts

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of employee performance metrics over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth, TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Performing Employees
sql_queries.description: List of employees with the highest sales or performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Sales by Employee
sql_queries.description: Aggregate sales figures attributed to each employee
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance by Region
sql_queries.description: Comparison of employee performance across different regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.Region, e.EmployeeID ORDER BY e.Region, TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Sales Growth Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage growth in sales attributed to employee efforts
sql_queries.sql: WITH SalesByMonth AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY OrderMonth), GrowthRate AS (SELECT OrderMonth, TotalSales, LAG(TotalSales) OVER (ORDER BY OrderMonth) AS PreviousMonthSales FROM SalesByMonth) SELECT OrderMonth, (TotalSales - PreviousMonthSales) / PreviousMonthSales * 100.0 AS GrowthRate FROM GrowthRate WHERE PreviousMonthSales IS NOT NULL
